title: ksshell
html:
ksshell

File Read

Each line is corrupted by a prefix string. Also consider that lines are actually parsed as `kickstart` scripts thus some file contents may lead to unexpected results.

ksshell -i /path/to/input-file
excerpt: ksshell File Read Each line is corrupted by a prefix string. Also consider that lines are actually parsed as `kickstart` scripts thus some file contents may lead to unexpected results. ksshell -i /path/to/input-file
